allow: Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w 'Status: %{http_code}\\nHeaders:\\n' -X OPTIONS https://api.myrealphone.cloud/auth/login -H 'Origin: https://admin.myrealphone.cloud' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Method: POST' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Headers: Content-Type' -D -)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\xiaowei_android\\" -Depth 2 | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "\\.json|\\.yaml|\\.ini|\\.config|\\.conf|\\.xml|api|doc|readme" -or $_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object FullName | Select-Object -First 40)
